title: Handling Constraint Violation Flow
description: A flowchart depicting the process of a DBMS checking for and handling various types of integrity constraint violations during a data manipulation operation (e.g., INSERT, UPDATE).
elements: Check Entity Integrity (Primary Key, NOT NULL)
relationships: User sends DML command to DBMS
DBMS sequentially checks each constraint type
If any check fails, flow proceeds to Rollback
If all checks pass, flow proceeds to Commit
